items.title: US technology stocks move higher as AI demand remains in focus
items.summary: Major technology stocks gained attention as investors continued to focus on demand for AI infrastructure and semiconductor products.

items.title: Currency markets watch interest rate expectations and dollar movement
items.summary: Foreign exchange markets remained focused on interest rate expectations, with USD/JPY movements influencing market sentiment.

items.title: Global markets react to inflation data and central bank comments
items.summary: Investors monitored inflation data and central bank comments to assess the outlook for rates and global equity markets.

items.title: European markets monitor energy prices and policy outlook
items.summary: European markets watched energy price movements and policy discussions as investors evaluated cost pressures across manufacturing and transportation sectors.

items.title: Asian equities trade mixed as investors assess regional earnings
items.summary: Asian equity markets showed mixed movement as investors reviewed regional corporate earnings, currency trends, and demand expectations in major export sectors.
